project: Governing the AI Analyst - semantic layer + MCP + DeepEval over real SEC SaaS financials

phases.name: Ingestion
phases.notes: 1121 annual 10-K facts across 10 cos; anchors match filings exactly (CRM FY24 34.857B, SNOW FY24 2.806B, etc). 13KB parquet snapshot committed for offline CI. Known gap: WDAY no single GrossProfit/CostOfRevenue tag; RPO inconsistent.
deliverables: fetch_edgar.py: companyfacts API -> filter 10-K/FY facts -> raw.* in DuckDB
frozen raw fixture committed for offline CI

phases.name: dbt transform
phases.notes: staging tag-normalization (coalesce candidate XBRL tags) -> marts.fct_company_year (116 company-years). 11/11 dbt tests pass incl. anchor test vs filings + uniqueness + accepted_values + relationships. WDAY gross_profit null by design. Metrics locked: total_revenue, revenue_growth_yoy, gross_margin, operating_margin, rnd_intensity, fcf_margin, rule_of_40.

phases.name: Semantic layer + ground truth
phases.notes: metrics.yml (7 governed metrics, single source of truth) + loader with sql_expression column-allowlist validation + resolver (longest-phrase precedence: 'gross margin' resolves, bare 'margin' ambiguous, out-of-scope refuses). Independent hand-written ground-truth SQL (no compiler reuse). db.py is the MotherDuck swap-in seam. 17 unit tests pass.
deliverables: finalize metric list against ingested data
independent hand-written ground-truth SQL anchored to filings

phases.name: MCP server
deliverables: compiler (metric def -> SQL, no raw-SQL path)
phases.notes: compiler.py compiles definition->parameterized SQL (no raw-SQL path: expr from validated definition, filter columns from fixed map, values bound). tools.py: list_metrics/get_metric_definition/resolve_metric/query_metric shared by MCP server + agent. server.py FastMCP (stdio) exposes exactly those 4 tools. 31 tests pass incl. injection/guard tests.

phases.name: Agent
deliverables: Claude wired to MCP tools only
